prompt: Open Safari Settings (Cmd+,) > Websites > Pop-up Windows. example.com is in the Currently Open Websites list. Set its per-site permission to 'Allow' (instead of Block / Block and Notify). Or cerebellum 'safari disable_popup_blocker_for example.com ~/Desktop/kinbench/109-popups-confirm.txt' which writes the confirm file (the per-site plist is TCC-protected). Then write 'popups allowed for example.com' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/109-popups-confirm.txt.
